import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Exchange code for token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/hc-oauth2/token"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Exchange authorization code for access token

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"grant_type":{"type":"string","enum":["authorization_code","refresh_token"],"description":"grant flow type, only `authorization_code` and `refresh_token` is supported"},"client_id":{"type":"string","description":"client_id parameter of your application, received at application registration"},"client_secret":{"type":"string","description":"client_secret parameter of your application, received at application registration"}},"required":["grant_type","client_id","client_secret"],"oneOf":[{"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"authorization code, received from authorization server"}},"required":["code"]},{"properties":{"refresh_token":{"type":"string","description":"refresh token, received from authorization server"}},"required":["refresh_token"]}],"example":{"grant_type":"authorization_code","client_id":"<your client ID>","client_secret":"<your client secret>","code":"12254a1124"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["token_type","access_token","expires_in"],"properties":{"refresh_token":{"type":"string","example":"7dbadd74c434439db4fc9b2bbf8cabb3","description":"refresh token, if supported"},"token_type":{"type":"string","example":"bearer","description":"token type. Always \"bearer\"."},"access_token":{"type":"string","example":"ccafe62cbce645ce95b2acce839f4acc","description":"access token, to be included in API request"},"expires_in":{"type":"number","example":7200,"description":"access token validity, in seconds"}},"title":"TokenResponse"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"refresh_token":"7dbadd74c434439db4fc9b2bbf8cabb3","token_type":"bearer","access_token":"ccafe62cbce645ce95b2acce839f4acc","expires_in":7200}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
